author: quorafind
description: A big calendar for Obsidian. All events from your daily notes OR tasks used TASKS/DATAVIEW/KANBAN format.

manifest.author: Boninall
manifest.description: Supports drag and drop, resizing, and more for events in Obsidian
manifest.name: Big Calendar

name: Big Calendar

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:

* Feat/1 2 0 by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/pull/46

    * Support filter
    * Support default workspace


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
- **Refactor Big Calendar Plugin.**
- **Temporarily removed the recognition of date tasks supported by plugins such as Dataview**


## What's Changed
* Refactor Big Calendar by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/pull/21
* Remove unused files by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/pull/22
* Remove unused files by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/pull/23
* Remove unused files by @Quorafind in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/pull/24

## New Contributors
* @Quorafind made their first contribution in https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/pull/21

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Quorafind/Obsidian-Big-Calendar/compare/0.2.1...0.3.0

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description: - Support dataview tasks due date and created date

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
- Support add event by on click or select.
- Support recognize Tasks/Kanban tasks's format with date.
- Fix bugs I knew.

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description: -Fix memory leak problem, now memory should be free as usual

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
## Small update

- Support CSS class, base on TODO Task\DONE Task\Journal.
- Support double click on event to jump to its original note.

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
- [x] Fix cannot parse when there are excalidraw or folder note md files in Daily Note Folder.
- [x] Fix should restart again to make the calendar index.
- [x] Fix add tasks and should restart it to index.
- [x] Fix cannot index today tasks.
- [x] Fix restart obsidian will kill calendar.

releases.author: Quorafind
releases.description:
- Support Month\Daily\Week\Agenda view.
- Support TODO AND DONE AND Other marks
- Support `- 19:00` time format
- Support All daily notes
